query:
SELECT 
  pbi.id, pbi.worker_id, w.full_name, w.code as worker_code,
  pbi.days_worked, pbi.base_amount, pbi.total_deductions, 
  pbi.total_bonuses, pbi.net_amount
FROM payroll_batch_items pbi
JOIN workers w ON pbi.worker_id = w.id
WHERE pbi.batch_id = (SELECT id FROM payroll_batches WHERE batch_code = 'Batch-2026-02-001')
ORDER BY pbi.worker_id;
